title: jasminum arborescens var. montanum
intro: Jasminum arborescens var. montanum, also known as the mountain jasmine or Indian jasmine, is a fragrant, flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, and is said to have health benefits including reducing stress and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Jasminum arborescens var. montanum is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
